summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The 21Shares 2x Long Sui ETF (TXXS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long sui, short usd currency. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Sui (SUI) through derivatives, net of fees and expenses. The fund will not invest directly in SUI TXXS was launched on Dec 4, 2025 and is issued by 21Shares.
